channel.title: Phishing on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Phishing on Pi Stack

item.title: dnstwist vs DNSGen vs RipGen: Self-Hosted Domain Permutation & Typosquatting Detection Guide 2026
item.description: Domain names are your organization’s digital identity. When attackers register lookalike domains — swapping a single character, substituting a visually similar Unicode character, or adding a hyphen — your users, employees, and customers become targets for credential harvesting, malware delivery, and financial fraud.
